rulings.Case Title: CINDY YU et al VS. SHAWN SHAO DAN YU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint, Or In The Alternative, To Consolidate Matters
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 29, 2014, line 5. PLAINTIFFs CINDY YU and TOSHIYUKI MUSHA's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint, Or In The Alternative, To Consolidate Matters granted as follows: Motion to consolidate is GRANTED, and therefore motion for leave to file an amended complaint is moot. Parties who have appeared in either action are subject to Court's jurisdiction. See, e.g. Hamilton v. Asbestos Corp. LTD (2000) 22 Cal.4th 1127, 1147-48. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: 32 HERON-103 LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. MARK MENDAROS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 29, 2014, line 9. DEFENDANT MARK MENDAROS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint alleges that the premises as issue are commercial. Defendant cites no authority for the proposition that CCP 1161c is applicable to commercial premises. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: 32 HERON-103 LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. MARK MENDAROS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 29, 2014, line 9. DEFENDANT EUGENE HOOD's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Defendant's asserted tenancy and tenancy rights are issues of fact not properly raised on demurrer. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: 950 B14 DE LLC VS. KATHY BENSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 29, 2014, line 10. DEFENDANTs ED DISHART and KATHY BENSON DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT overruled, 5 days to answer. Demurrer improperly raises issues of fact not appearing in the complaint or judicially noticeable documents. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 29, 2014, line 12. DEFENDANTs KEYHAN MOHANNA and MOHANNA, KEYHAN AS TRUSTEE OF THE KEYHAN MOHANNA's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons DENIED, 5 days to respond. Defendant fails to provide any admissible evidence in support of his motion. Additionally, Defendant's motion is untimely per CCP 1167.4(a). = (501/RBU)
